metadata.title: e-POWER
metadata.description: Nissan Global Newsroom | Latest news, photos and videos. Visit our global newsroom for announcements, photos and videos from Nissan Motor Corporation.

links.text: No Saved Items Saved Item Saved Items
Wayve, Uber and Nissan announce collaboration on Robotaxis
New Nissan LEAF crowned Supreme Winner for 2026 by Women's Worldwide Car of the Year
Dongfeng Nissan launches the All-New NX8 in China
All-new 2027 INFINITI QX65 debuts in U.S.
Wayve and Nissan to exhibit global robotaxi prototype vehicle powered by NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion for Uber trials
CDP awards A-rank to Nissan for climate change and water security initiatives
Vision of Mobility Intelligence for Everyday Life
Nissan reports financial results for fiscal year 2025
#23 MOTUL Niterra Z finishes 3rd; Nissan Z NISMO secures consecutive podium finishes at Fuji
Nissan Formula E Team stands on the podium both days in Berlin double-header
Nissan launches X‑Trail NISMO in Japan
Nissan today announced the launch of the first-ever, X‑Trail NISMO in Japan.
Nissan launches third generation e‑POWER technology in Europe
Nearly a decade after its global debut, Nissan is launching the most advanced form of its unique e‑POWER technology.
Nissan expands availability of next-generation NissanConnect Services
Nissan Motor Co., Ltd. has expanded the availability of its next-generation NissanConnect services into Europe.
Serena wins COTY Technology Car of the Year award in Japan

Nissan announces today that the Serena minivan won the Technology Car of the Year award as part of 2023-2024 Japan Car of the year awards. The award for the Serena follows that for the Nissan X‑Trail won last year.
Serena wins RJC car and technology of the year awards
Nissan announces today that the Serena minivan won the RJC Car of the Year award and the RJC Technology of the Year award in Japan for 2023.
Nissan Sunderland Plant passes 11 million milestone
The team at Nissan Sunderland Plant are celebrating building their 11 millionth vehicle since production started in 1986.
Nissan highlights electrification and connectivity at Auto Shanghai 2023
Nissan is highlighting a wide range of electrified and seamlessly connected vehicles that aim to exceed consumer expectations at Auto Shanghai 2023.
Nissan X‑Trail awarded best Large SUV by Women’s World Car of the Year 2023
The jury of the Women’s World Car of the Year (WWCOTY) 2023 has awarded Nissan X‑Trail the title of Best Large SUV 2023 for its thirteenth edition.
Nissan launches the all-new Serena in Japan
Nissan today announced the launch of the fully-revamped Serena in Japan. Sales of gasoline-powered models will start this winter, and e‑POWER models are to start in spring.
Nissan launches the all-new X‑Trail in Japan
Nissan today launched the all-new X‑Trail in Japan, with sales starting on July 25.
New Nissan Kicks goes on sale in Japan

Following a minor model change, the new Nissan Kicks electrified SUV goes on sale July 19 across Japan. The vehicle launch marks another milestone in Nissan’s expansion of its electrified vehicle lineup.
Nissan charges towards electrified future with new line-up and technologies

Today, Nissan has set its course firmly towards a sustainable future and bolstered its position in the European market with the presentation of its new six-part electrified line-up arriving this Summer.
Nissan announces all-new electric compact car coming to Europe
Nissan today announced an all-new compact electric vehicle coming to European markets.
Nissan heads to Tokyo Auto Salon 2022

The all-new Japan-market Fairlady Z will be among the highlights as Nissan displays a variety of models, from the recently unveiled Z GT500 racecar to exciting customized Nissan Note models, at the Tokyo Auto Salon 2022.
Nissan Note and Note Aura win Japan Car of the Year award
The Nissan Note and Note Aura have been named the 2021-22 Japan Car of the Year. This is the fifth time Nissan has won this award in total.
Note and Note Aura named 2022 RJC Car of the Year in Japan, Second-generation e‑POWER awarded RJC Technology of the Year 6 best

The Automotive Researchers’ & Journalists’ Conference Japan announced today that it has named the Nissan Note / Note Aura the 31st (2022) RJC Car of the Year and given the second generation e‑POWER system the RJC Technology of the Year award 6 best.
Note Aura wins Japan Automotive Hall of Fame Car of the Year 2021-2022
The Japan Automotive Hall of Fame (JAHFA) announced today that the Nissan Note Aura is the 2021-2022 JAHFA Car of the Year.
Nissan launches Note Autech Crossover in Japan
Nissan and its affiliate Autech announced today the start of sales of the Note Autech Crossover in Japan.
Nissan unveils e‑POWER on Sylphy in China
Nissan today unveiled the e‑POWER Sylphy, the first model equipped with the award-winning e‑POWER technology for customers in China.
Nissan announces launch of Note Aura NISMO and start of sales of Note Aura in Japan

Nissan Motor Co., Ltd. today announced the launch of the Note Aura NISMO, sales of which are scheduled to start in Japan this autumn. Sales in Japan of the Note Aura, which was announced in June this year, start today.
Nissan launches the all-new Note Aura in Japan
Nissan today launched the all-new Note Aura premium compact car in Japan, with sales planned to start in autumn.
Nissan launches lightweight aluminum technology in Europe on all-new Qashqai
The all-new Qashqai will be Nissan’s first model built in Europe using a significant number of lightweight aluminum panels.
Sales in Japan of e‑POWER electrified vehicles surpasses 500,000-unit cumulative milestone
Nissan announced today that cumulative sales of vehicles with its e‑POWER electrified powertrain surpassed 500,000 units at the end of March.
Nissan today unveiled the all-new Nissan Qashqai compact crossover SUV for the European market, set to go on sale this summer.

Nissan CEO Ivan Espinosa, Wayve CEO Alex Kendall and Uber Head of Autonomous Mobility & Delivery Sarfraz Maredia with the robotaxi prototype.

A white robotaxi prototype based on the new Nissan LEAF is shown from the side in an outdoor display area. Trees, tall buildings, and a booth with a large screen appear in the background.

A turquoise Nissan LEAF electric vehicle is parked along a scenic coastal road, with the calm sea and a glowing sunset stretching across the horizon. In the top-left corner, the CDP logo appears, highlighting its highest “A List” rating for Climate Change and Water Security.
On a stage with a red background, a light blue vehicle is displayed facing slightly forward at an angle. The words “NISSAN” and “VISION” are shown in the background.

At the center of a circular stage, the sporty concept car “AURA NISMO RS Concept” is displayed, facing slightly to the right front. The car features a matte dark gray body with bold red accents on the front lip and black wheels. The background is black with white logos reading “NISSAN,” “AURA nismo RS CONCEPT,” and “nismo” at the top, while several spotlights shine from above. On the left side of the stage stands a person in a suit, and in the foreground, multiple photographers and media personnel are capturing the scene.
